member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Pdf.CmaPdfGenerator.HexOrDefault(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parses a CSS hex color (e.g. "#2E7D32") for use as a QuestPDF color string. Falls back to if is null or malformed.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Pdf.CmaPdfGenerator.MonthsBetween(System.DateOnly,System.DateOnly)
member.summary: Returns the number of whole months between two dates.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Activities.Pdf.PdfActivity
member.summary: Reusable activity that generates a CMA PDF and persists it via . Designed for direct invocation from any pipeline step — not a BackgroundService.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Pdf.PdfActivity.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Cma.Interfaces.ICmaPdfGenerator,RealEstateStar.Domain.Cma.Interfaces.IPdfDataService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Activities.Pdf.PdfActivity})
member.summary: Reusable activity that generates a CMA PDF and persists it via . Designed for direct invocation from any pipeline step — not a BackgroundService.
Generates a CMA PDF for the given lead and analysis, writes it to document storage as base-64, and returns the storage path.
member.returns: The storage path of the persisted PDF (e.g. "folder/file.pdf.b64").

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Pdf.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPdfService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers as and as a scoped service.
